subcodes.first_line: Say: The taking of life is no proof of manliness and valor. If ye be able, revive withered and lifeless souls through the breaths of divine mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو قتل نفس دلیل مردی و مردانگی نیست اگر قادرید نفوس پژمرده  و مرده را بنفحات رحمانیه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
